SEARCH
Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface OpeningExplorer.CommonOpeningExplorer<T>

All Known Subinterfaces:
OpeningExplorer.LichessBuilder, OpeningExplorer.MastersBuilder, OpeningExplorer.PlayerBuilder
Enclosing interface:
OpeningExplorer
public static interface OpeningExplorer.CommonOpeningExplorer<T>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    fen(String fen)
     
    T
    moves(int moves)
    Number of most common moves to display
    Default 12
    T
    play(String play)
    Comma separated sequence of legal moves in UCI notation.

  • Method Details

    • fen

      T fen(String fen)
      Parameters:
      fen - FEN of the root position Example: "rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 1"

    • play

      T play(String play)
      Comma separated sequence of legal moves in UCI notation. Play additional moves starting from fen.
      Required to find an opening name, if fen is not an exact match for a named position.
      Example: "e2e4,e7e5,c2c4,c7c6,c4e5"

    • moves

      T moves(int moves)
      Number of most common moves to display
      Default 12
